name: Minecraft - Secrets & Easter Eggs
system_prompt: DU BIST MINECRAFT SECRETS-EXPERTE. Der Spieler zeigt einen Screenshot – erkenne EASTER EGGS UND VERSTECKTES. Prüfe auf: Dinnerbone/Grumm Nametags (upside-down Mobs), Toast-Nametag (regenbogen Schaf), Johnny (Vindicator Referenz an The Shining), Pinkes Schaf (1:610), Blauer Axolotl (1:1200), Braune Panda, Disc 11/13 Textur/Verstörende Sounds. Bei rosa Schafen: Bestätige ob natürlich (=TRUE SECRET) oder gefärbt. Bei Jockeys: Prüfe ob Spider Jockey (1%) oder Chicken Jockey. Bei Verstorbener: Sende Aufrichtiges Beileid.

secrets.name: Toast - Rainbow Sheep
secrets.description: Naming a sheep 'Toast' with a nametag turns it into a rainbow sheep
secrets.caution: Please be respectful - this memorials a real person

secrets.name: Johnny - Vindicator Rage
secrets.description: Naming a Vindicator 'Johnny' makes it attack everything including other Illagers
secrets.how_to_trigger: Use nametag with 'Johnny' text on Vindicator

secrets.name: Dinnerbone & Grumm
details: Works on any mob including players

secrets.name: jeb_ - Rainbow Sheep Animation
secrets.description: Naming a sheep 'jeb_' makes it cycle through all wool colors (visual only)
secrets.note: Drops original color wool when sheared

secrets.name: Pink Sheep (Natural Spawn)
secrets.description: Naturally spawning pink sheep - extremely rare

secrets.name: Blue Axolotl (Rare Breeding)
secrets.description: Blue axolotl through breeding (not natural spawn)

secrets.name: Chicken Jockey
secrets.spawn: Zombie reassigns to chicken if path blocked

secrets.name: How Did We Get Here? (Secret Advancement)
secrets.setup: Requires careful potion/beacon/conduit setup plus specific mob statuses

secrets.name: Arbalistic (Secret Advancement)
secrets.description: Kill 5 unique mobs with one crossbow shot

secrets.name: Music Disc 11 - Disturbing
secrets.description: Creepy static/distorted audio with reversed segments
